issue_title: Fix/cms 79 fix the belongs to many bug
issue_body_preview:
When a user is logged into Tensei cms, user clicks on ¨reviews¨ on the resource page and clicks on ¨edit¨, the page goes blank.

This bug is caused by the Belongs to Many form component

This issue was fixed earlier but was reported to still be buggy.
test_description_zh: 登录 Tensei CMS 后，在资源页面中点击 'reviews' 资源列表，然后点击某条记录的 'edit' 编辑按钮，观察编辑页面是否正常加载并显示表单内容（特别是包含 Belongs to Many 关系字段的表单）。
expected_result_zh: 点击编辑按钮后，编辑页面应正常渲染，显示完整的编辑表单（包括 Belongs to Many 关系字段），页面不应出现白屏或空白页面。
